intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (GSM5746259, Patient 145 Day 0) with standard scanpy QC and clustering. Let me start by reading the skill to follow best practices.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present a plan for processing this sample:

input.title: Scanpy QC and clustering for GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
input.summary: Standard scanpy workflow: QC metrics → filtering → normalization → HVG selection → PCA → neighborhood graph → UMAP → Leiden clustering → marker genes
input.rationale: Follow the best-practice scanpy recipe to identify cell types and population structure in the first COVID-19 PBMC sample.
input.assumptions:
- Using Patient 145 Day 0 (GSM5746259) as the single sample to process
  - Standard QC thresholds: ≥200 genes per cell, <20% mitochondrial reads
  - Leiden resolution=1.0 (default) for clustering
  - 2,000 highly variable genes for downstream analysis

steps.title: Load and calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Load the first sample's count matrix and compute n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Remove outlier cells (n_genes <200 or pct_mito ≥0.20) and genes expressed in <3 cells

steps.title: Normalize and log-transform
steps.description: Total count normalization (1e4 counts/cell) followed by log1p

steps.title: Identify highly variable genes (HVG)
steps.description: Use seurat_v3 method to select ~2,000 genes for downstream analysis

steps.title: PCA and neighborhood graph
steps.description: PCA on HVGs (n_comps=50), compute neighbors (n_neighbors=15), then UMAP

steps.title: Leiden clustering
steps.description: Apply Leiden algorithm at resolution=1.0 on the neighborhood graph

steps.title: Identify cluster markers
steps.description: Rank genes by log2FC and p-value within each cluster (rank_genes_groups)
